name: foxfence
description: Model reliability & safety module for agents — OpenAI-compatible proxy with tool-calling shim and inline safety detectors
author: Alexandre Gonzales <alex@zenfox.ai>

scripts.build:all: for t in bun-linux-x64 bun-linux-arm64 bun-darwin-x64 bun-darwin-arm64 bun-windows-x64; do bun build --compile --target=$t --outfile dist/foxfence-${t#bun-} src/main.ts; done
